parameters.body:
={
  "cycle_id": "{{ $('Build text chunks + sanitize').item.json.cycle_id }}",
  "recipient_id": "{{ $('Build text chunks + sanitize').item.json.recipient_id }}",
  "question_id": {{ $('Build text chunks + sanitize').item.json.question_id ? `"${$('Build text chunks + sanitize').item.json.question_id}"` : 'null' }},
  "category": "{{ $('Build text chunks + sanitize').item.json.category }}",
  "assignment_type": "{{ $('Build text chunks + sanitize').item.json.assignment_type }}",
  "chunk_text": {{ JSON.stringify($('Build text chunks + sanitize').item.json.chunk_text) }},
  "giver_count": {{ $('Build text chunks + sanitize').item.json.giver_count }},
  "total_givers": {{ $('Build text chunks + sanitize').item.json.total_givers }},
  "embedding": {{ JSON.stringify($json.data[0].embedding) }}
}

={
  "cycle_id":     "{{ $('Webhook — Cycle Published').item.json.cycle_id }}",
  "recipient_id": "{{ $('Loop over recipients').item.json.recipient_id }}",
  "scope":        "rag_full",
  "ai_summary":   {{ JSON.stringify($('Parse Claude JSON output').item.json.summary) }},
  "theme_tags":   {{ JSON.stringify($('Parse Claude JSON output').item.json.theme_tags) }},
  "computed_at":  "{{ new Date().toISOString() }}"
}

meta.notes:
RAG summarization pipeline for 360° feedback.

Required n8n Variables (Settings > Variables):
  SUPABASE_URL               — your Supabase project URL
  SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY  — service role key (never anon key)
  OPENAI_API_KEY             — for text-embedding-3-small
  ANTHROPIC_API_KEY          — for claude-sonnet-4-6
  RAG_SYSTEM_PROMPT          — paste the full system prompt from scripts/generate_summaries_rag.ts

Trigger: POST https://<n8n-host>/webhook/cycle-published
Body:    { "cycle_id": "<uuid>" }

Run ingest_embeddings.ts manually first if you want to pre-warm the vector store
before triggering this workflow.
